scripts.start: npm run build && APP_ENV=dev node dist/index.js
scripts.start:dev: npm run build && APP_ENV=dev NODE_ENV=development node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && APP_ENV=prod NODE_ENV=production node dist/index.js
scripts.deploy-commands:dev: npm run build && APP_ENV=dev NODE_ENV=development node dist/deploy-commands.js
scripts.deploy-commands:prod: npm run build && APP_ENV=prod NODE_ENV=production node dist/deploy-commands.js
scripts.pm2:dev: npm run build && APP_ENV=dev NODE_ENV=development pm2 start dist/index.js --name haruharu-bot-dev
scripts.pm2:prod: npm run build && APP_ENV=prod NODE_ENV=production pm2 start dist/index.js --name haruharu-bot-prod
scripts.local:ci: npm run lint && npx prettier --check src && npm test
